title: Publisher Admission, Buffering, and Backpressure · Changed-Input Lab
summary: An independent Go integration team receives different topology, traffic, schema, tenant, dependency, and shutdown constraints and transfers the module into a new a cancellable Go publisher admission controller. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a cancellable Go publisher admission controller with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Treat a nil PublishWithContext error as local call acceptance only and separately track flow control, routing, confirmation, and stakeholder effect.
Pause admission after false, coordinate a bounded drain waiter, handle close and abort, and avoid lost wakeups or listener leaks; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Propagate publisher capacity to HTTP or job admission with queue, byte, time, tenant, and rejection budgets; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Publish Context Admission
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go messaging team handles case 5620 during Go publisher supervisor losing one state notification. Build deterministic Go evidence to propagate broker blocking, byte capacity, and confirm-window saturation into admission; prove cleanup under a single deadline and cancellation cause; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Treat a nil PublishWithContext error as local call acceptance only and separately track flow control, routing, confirmation, and stakeholder effect.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Publish Context Admission.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for treat a nil publishwithcontext error as local call acceptance only and separately track flow control, routing, confirmation, and stakeholder effect. For RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Publish Context Admission, keep Publish Context Admission connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Drain Single Waiter · changed case · Lab Drain Single Waiter

lab case — A lab Go messaging team handles case 6334 during quorum failover exercise during a rolling broker restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to propagate broker blocking, byte capacity, and confirm-window saturation into admission; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement owner; then close the owning channel before one delivery decision. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
